summary: Sprint 4 refactoring testing completed. Fixed backend bug with extra hours API (query params). All 25 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms: fixed sidebar layout, role-based menu access (televendas vs supervisor), Agenda Completa with slot navigation, Extra Hours Manager, Dashboard metrics cards.
passed_tests: Backend: Supervisor login - 200 OK
Backend: Televendas login - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/slots/all - Supervisor access - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/slots/all - Televendas access - 200 OK (Agenda Completa available)
Backend: 12:40 NOT shown by default (extra slot)
Backend: Normal slots include 12:00 and 12:20
Backend: Slots have availability info (available, occupied, pending)
Backend: Extra slots have is_extra=true flag
Backend: GET /api/extra-hours - returns available and active slots
Backend: PUT /api/extra-hours - Supervisor can enable extra hours
Backend: PUT /api/extra-hours - Televendas forbidden (403)
Backend: Extra hours appear in /api/slots/all when enabled
Backend: Deactivate extra hours works correctly
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard - Supervisor access - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard - Televendas forbidden (403)
Backend: GET /api/appointments/pending - Supervisor access
Backend: GET /api/appointments/pending - Televendas forbidden (403)
Backend: GET /api/users - Supervisor access
Backend: GET /api/users - Televendas forbidden (403)
Backend: GET /api/presence/agents - Supervisor access
Backend: GET /api/presence/agents - Televendas forbidden (403)
Backend: Televendas can access appointments
Backend: Televendas can create appointments
Backend: Televendas can access available-slots
Backend: Date navigation works for different dates
Frontend: Televendas sees Dashboard, Agenda Completa, Meus Agendamentos
Frontend: Televendas does NOT see Pendentes, Usuarios, Painel Supervisor
Frontend: Supervisor sees all menu options including Pendentes, Usuarios, Painel Supervisor
Frontend: Dashboard shows metrics cards (Total, Pendentes, Emitidos, Auto-atribuídos)
Frontend: Painel Supervisor accessible with /supervisor route
Frontend: Extra Hours Manager shows all 5 extra slots (07:40, 12:40, 18:00, 18:20, 18:40)
Frontend: Extra hour toggle and save functionality works
Frontend: Agenda Completa shows date navigation (Anterior/Hoje/Próximo)
Frontend: Slots show availability count (e.g., '4 disponível(is)')
Frontend: 'Novo' button on slots opens Novo Agendamento modal
Frontend: Modal pre-fills date and time_slot from clicked slot
Frontend: Agent presence list visible in supervisor panel
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed PUT /api/extra-hours to accept List[str] as Query params with default=[]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 4 refactoring complete. Layout now has fixed sidebar with role-based menu. Televendas can see Agenda Completa but not supervisor options (Pendentes, Usuarios, Painel Supervisor). Extra hours (07:40, 12:40, 18:00, 18:20, 18:40) managed via /supervisor page. 12:40 removed from default slots. Fixed backend bug where PUT /api/extra-hours was rejecting query params - now uses Query(default=[]).

layout_saas.role_based_menu: Menu items shown based on user role

agenda_completa.slot_display: Shows time_slot, availability count, pending count

extra_hours.default_state: All extra slots disabled by default
extra_hours.12:40_removal: Not shown in normal slots, only when activated as extra

can_see: All menu items including Pendentes, Usuarios, Painel Supervisor

bug_fixed.issue: Was expecting body but frontend sends query params
bug_fixed.fix: Changed slots parameter to Query(default=[]) from List[str]
